courseDetails.deliveryMethod: App-assisted independent learning and retrieval practice

curriculumIntent.context: Provides learners with essential practical math skills required for everyday life, employment, and further education.
curriculumIntent.knowledge: Mastery of whole numbers, decimals, fractions, percentages, basic geometry, measure, time, money, and data extraction.
curriculumIntent.employabilitySkills: Problem-solving, budgeting, interpreting data charts, estimating costs, and calculating timesheets/schedules.
curriculumIntent.modernBritainSkills: Developing financial literacy, critical thinking when interpreting statistics in the media, and independent problem-solving.

topics.title: Understanding Number
topics.plannedOutcomes: Build confidence in reading, writing, and comparing large numbers and working with negative temperatures/bank balances.
topics.learnerCan: Write numbers up to millions, order positive/negative numbers, calculate temperature changes.
topics.activities: Real-world banking scenarios (overdrafts) and weather maps. AI-generated starter quizzes.

topics.title: Calculations
topics.plannedOutcomes: Develop robust arithmetic skills for employability, calculating totals, differences, and splitting costs.
topics.learnerCan: Add, subtract, multiply, and divide whole numbers. Solve multi-step word problems.
topics.activities: Shop inventory calculation tasks. Peer-to-peer checking. Mini-whiteboard mixed operations.
topics.retrieval: Starter task identifying Place Value of digits within the calculation problems.

topics.title: Ratio & Proportion
topics.plannedOutcomes: Apply multiplicative reasoning to everyday contexts such as decorating, cooking, and mixing solutions.
topics.learnerCan: Simplify ratios to lowest terms, scale recipes, calculate direct proportion.
topics.activities: Mock 'Builder's Quote' activity—scaling up materials needed for a job.
topics.retrieval: Practice multiplication and division facts used to simplify ratios.

topics.title: Rounding & Estimation
topics.plannedOutcomes: Develop the ability to check calculations and estimate costs/materials in practical trades.
topics.learnerCan: Round to the nearest 10, 100, 1000. Estimate totals in practical money contexts.
topics.activities: Estimating shopping bills and verifying calculator answers for sensible outcomes.
topics.retrieval: Recap place value columns before rounding.

topics.title: Fractions
topics.plannedOutcomes: Understand parts of a whole for use in cooking, sales, and sharing resources.
topics.learnerCan: Compare fractions, find equivalent fractions, calculate fractions of amounts.
topics.activities: Visual fraction walls. Calculating discount fractions (e.g., 1/4 off).
topics.retrieval: Division practice for finding fractions of quantities.

topics.title: Decimals
topics.plannedOutcomes: Master decimal arithmetic, the backbone of all financial literacy and measurement.
topics.learnerCan: Order decimals, add/subtract money, multiply/divide decimals by 10/100.
topics.activities: Mock wage-slip calculations. Till receipt error-checking.
topics.retrieval: Link decimal placement to place value and whole number operations.

topics.title: Percentages
topics.plannedOutcomes: Calculate taxes, tips, and discounts to navigate personal finance effectively.
topics.learnerCan: Find 10%, 25%, 50%. Calculate percentage increase (wages) and decrease (sales).
topics.activities: Calculating new prices after Black Friday discounts and wage increases.
topics.retrieval: Convert common fractions (1/2, 1/4) to their percentage equivalents.

topics.title: Using a Calculator
topics.plannedOutcomes: Efficiently use technology to solve complex multi-step problems and check manual work.
topics.learnerCan: Convert FDP using a calculator, round calculator displays to 2 decimal places.
topics.activities: Calculating complex percentages (e.g., 17.5% VAT) using the % button.
topics.retrieval: Manual estimation to check if the calculator answer is sensible.

topics.title: Money and Time
topics.plannedOutcomes: Manage personal schedules, read timetables, and calculate correct change.
topics.learnerCan: Calculate change, convert 12/24 hour clocks, calculate durations in hours and minutes.
topics.activities: Planning a journey using train timetables. Cash handling simulations.
topics.retrieval: Decimal addition and subtraction for money problems.

topics.title: Units of Measure
topics.plannedOutcomes: Understand metric units for DIY, cooking, and travel.
topics.learnerCan: Convert mm/cm/m/km, g/kg, and ml/l. Read scales and thermometers.
topics.activities: Reading measuring jugs, weighing parcels, reading map scales.

topics.title: Perimeter and Area
topics.plannedOutcomes: Calculate material requirements for flooring, painting, and gardening.
topics.learnerCan: Calculate perimeter and area of rectangles. Calculate total costs based on area.
topics.activities: Designing a floor plan and calculating the cost of carpet and skirting boards.

topics.title: Volume
topics.plannedOutcomes: Understand 3D space for packing, storage, and construction.
topics.learnerCan: Calculate the volume of cuboids (L x W x H) and ensure unit consistency.
topics.activities: Calculating soil needed for a raised garden bed or water for a tank.
topics.retrieval: Area calculations extended to the third dimension.

topics.title: 2D, 3D and Scale
topics.plannedOutcomes: Develop spatial reasoning for design, reading plans, and understanding shapes.
topics.learnerCan: Identify angles, lines of symmetry, tessellation, and read scale plans.
topics.activities: Creating tessellating patterns. Measuring angles in a triangle.
topics.retrieval: Using measurement skills to draw accurate scale diagrams.

topics.title: Statistics
topics.plannedOutcomes: Critically analyze data presented in the workplace or the media.
topics.learnerCan: Calculate mean and range. Extract data from bar charts, pie charts, and line graphs.
topics.activities: Creating a tally chart of class data and converting it to a bar chart.
topics.retrieval: Addition and division skills used to calculate the mean.

topics.title: Probability
topics.plannedOutcomes: Understand likelihood and risk in real-world scenarios.
topics.learnerCan: Use the 0-1 probability scale. Express probability as fractions or decimals.
topics.activities: Analyzing the likelihood of winning a lottery or picking items from a bag.
topics.retrieval: Simplifying fractions and converting to percentages.
